description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a wide, square base for stability. The cone is primarily orange with two broad white bands encircling its midsection, showing some dirt and scuff marks indicative of outdoor use. The surface appears to be made of flexible plastic or rubber, with a matte finish and visible wear, especially near the base. The tip is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. The base is flat, thick, and slightly textured, designed to prevent tipping and provide grip on pavement. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible, and the overall condition suggests it is lightly used with some dirt and minor surface abrasions.
description: A standard orange traffic cone with two white bands, a pointed tip, and a wide, square base showing signs of light outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white bands and a slightly dirty, square base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting more pronounced dirt and scuff marks on the lower white band and base.
description_view_2: Rear view with visible wear and dirt on the base and lower cone, bands remain clearly defined.
description_view_3: Cleanest side with minimal dirt, showing the orange and white color bands and the sturdy base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: There are two wide, horizontal white bands encircling the cone, but they do not appear to be reflective.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and thick, made of the same material as the cone, with a slightly textured surface for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Lightly used with visible dirt, minor scuffs, and some surface wear, especially near the base.
